sources.name: HM Land Registry
sources.dataset: Price Paid Data and Title Registrations

metadata.methodology: Leasehold dwelling counts are derived from HM Land Registry title registrations and DLUHC estimates. Ground rent complaint data is compiled from the Property Ombudsman and First-Tier Tribunal (Property Chamber) case records. Leasehold properties include both houses and flats sold on a lease basis.
knownIssues: Precise ground rent amounts are not recorded centrally — estimates rely on sample surveys and tribunal cases
The boundary between lease management fees and ground rent is not consistently defined
Data on forfeiture and lease extension costs is fragmented across multiple tribunal jurisdictions
Many leaseholders are unaware of onerous terms until they try to sell, meaning complaint data understates actual harm
